About BaruChem

Trusted Chemical Distributor in Nigeria

BaruChem is a leading chemicals import and distribution company based in Nigeria. We source high-quality paints and industrial coating chemicals from global suppliers and deliver them to manufacturers nationwide.

We import, supply and distribute an extensive selection of high-performance chemicals including organic and inorganic pigments, titanium dioxide, styrene acrylic co-polymers, epoxy resins, and much more.

  • ISO-compliant sourcing and quality control
  • Direct import from global manufacturers
  • Technical support and product consultation
  • Pan-Nigeria distribution network

What We Do

Our Services

From sourcing to delivery, we cover every step of the supply chain.

01

Import & Sourcing

We source and import high-quality industrial chemicals directly from reputable global manufacturers, ensuring the best pricing and consistent supply.

02

Distribution & Delivery

Our wide network across Nigeria ensures fast and reliable delivery of your chemical orders to factories and businesses nationwide.

03

Technical Consultancy

Our expert team provides guidance on product selection, formulation support, and application advice to help you achieve optimal results.

Home › About Us

About BaruChem

Nigeria's leading chemicals import and distribution company — building quality partnerships across West Africa.

BaruChem Quality You Can Trust
Who We Are

A Trusted Name in Industrial Chemicals

BaruChem is a leading chemicals import and distribution company based in Nigeria. We source high-quality paints and industrial coating chemicals from global suppliers and distribute them to manufacturers and industries nationwide.

We import, supply and distribute an extensive selection of high-performance chemicals which include organic and inorganic pigments, titanium dioxide, styrene acrylic co-polymers, epoxy resins, HPMC, HEC, ethyl acetate and a wide range of other chemicals.

If quality is dear to you, then think BaruChem. We do not compromise the quality of our raw materials.

Our Direction

Vision & Mission

🎯 Our Vision

To become a leading and trusted supplier of high-quality paints and industrial coating chemicals in Nigeria and across West Africa, recognized for excellence, reliability, innovation, and our commitment to providing superior raw materials that support the growth and success of industries.

🚀 Our Mission

To become the preferred reference point for quality raw materials in Nigeria by delivering exceptional products, dependable services, and innovative solutions that meet the evolving needs of the paints and chemical industries. We are committed to maintaining the highest standards of quality, integrity, and customer satisfaction.

Home › Services

Our Services

From import sourcing to last-mile delivery and technical support — we handle the full supply chain.

What We Offer

End-to-End Chemical Supply Solutions

Tailored services for manufacturers, formulators, and distributors in the paints and coatings sector.

🌍

Chemical Import & Sourcing

We source premium-grade chemicals directly from reputable manufacturers in China, Europe, and North America — passing on competitive pricing to our clients.

Global Suppliers Competitive Pricing Quality Assured
🏭

Warehousing & Storage

Our temperature-controlled warehouses across 6 locations ensure your products are stored safely and are always ready for dispatch.

6 Locations Temperature-Controlled Bulk Storage
🚚

Nationwide Distribution

Our logistics network covers all major industrial hubs in Nigeria — Abuja, Lagos, Onitsha, Aba, Asaba, Benin and beyond.

Pan-Nigeria Fast Delivery Tracked Orders
🔬

Technical Consultancy

Our experienced chemists provide formulation advice, product selection guidance, and after-sales technical support for your production processes.

Formulation Support Expert Guidance After-Sales
✅

Quality Control & Testing

Every batch undergoes rigorous quality checks before dispatch — ensuring you always receive products that meet specifications.

Batch Testing CoA Available ISO Standards
📋

Custom Orders & Bulk Supply

We accommodate custom specifications and bulk purchase orders, ensuring consistency and value for high-volume buyers in manufacturing.

Bulk Discounts Custom Spec Contract Supply

Need a Custom Chemical Solution?

Talk to our team about your specific requirements. We're here to help.
